'''R'alla''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], located on the [[Solenbaran Merchant Route]] between [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]] and [[Kir]]. R'alla was home to many of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority's]] top media companies, and its lush, [[Color/Legends|green]] landscape had many farms and bubbling [[Water/Legends|water]] springs.<ref name="TEA" /> [[R'alla mineral water/Legends|R'alla mineral water]]—which was found in underground caverns below a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] town also called [[R'alla (town)|R'alla]]—<ref name="cswe">{{CSWECite|III|76|R'alla mineral water}}</ref> was widely exported throughout the Corporate Sector and beyond, and was often [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] to nearby, drought-ridden [[Rampa III]]. The short route between R'alla and Rampa III was heavy policed by Authority [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]], and was popularly referred to as the [[Rampa Rapids]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
R'alla was first mentioned in ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'', a novel written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1979]].<ref name="hsr">''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]''</ref> Further information on the planet was given in [[2009]]'s ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''.<ref name="TEA" />
